SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

Class Player

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Player extends Object implements Serializable
Class Player Description: This class represents a player in the game. It manages the player's state, including their hand of cards, objectives, ground, and other properties.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String username, GameServerInstance gameServerInstance, int clientID)
      Constructor for the Player class.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the player.
      gameServerInstance - The game server instance.
      clientID - The client ID of the player.

  • Method Details

    • getHandObjective

      public ArrayList<ObjectiveCard> getHandObjective()
      Returns:
      The list of objective cards in the player's hand.

    • draw

      public boolean draw(Deck deck)
      Draws a card from the specified deck and adds it to the player's hand.
      Parameters:
      deck - The deck from which to draw a card.
      Returns:
      True if a card is successfully drawn, otherwise false.

    • pick

      public void pick(Card card)
      Adds the specified card to the player's hand.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add to the hand.

    • playCard

      public int playCard(PlayableCard cardPlayed, boolean upwards, Coordinate coord)
      Plays the specified card on the player's ground at the given coordinates.
      Parameters:
      cardPlayed - The card to play.
      upwards - Whether the card is placed upwards.
      coord - The coordinates where the card is placed.
      Returns:
      The points awarded for playing the card, or -1 if an error occurs.

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Returns:
      The username of the player.

    • setToken

      public void setToken(PlayerColor token)
      Sets the player's token to the specified color and notifies all clients.
      Parameters:
      token - The color of the token.

    • getGround

      public PlayerGround getGround()
      Returns:
      The player's ground.

    • getHandCard

      public ArrayList<PlayableCard> getHandCard()
      Returns:
      The list of playable cards in the player's hand.

    • generateContentMap

      public HashMap<Content,Integer> generateContentMap()
      Generates a map of the resources and their counts in the player's ground.
      Returns:
      A map of resources and their counts.

    • addToHand

      public void addToHand(PlayableCard card)
      Adds the specified card to the player's hand and notifies all clients.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to add to the hand.

    • addToHand

      public void addToHand(ArrayList<PlayableCard> cards)
      Adds the specified list of cards to the player's hand and notifies all clients.
      Parameters:
      cards - The list of cards to add to the hand.

    • addToHandObjective

      public void addToHandObjective(ArrayList<ObjectiveCard> cards)
      Adds the specified list of objective cards to the player's hand and notifies all clients.
      Parameters:
      cards - The list of objective cards to add to the hand.

    • getToken

      public PlayerColor getToken()
      Returns:
      The player's token color.

    • getClientID

      public int getClientID()
      Returns:
      The client's ID.

    • canPlay

      public boolean canPlay()
      Returns:
      Whether the player can play.

    • setCanPlay

      public void setCanPlay(boolean canPlay)
      Sets whether the player can play.
      Parameters:
      canPlay - True if the player can play, otherwise false.
